title: PushkMC
description: PushkMC is an tech-adventure type modpack geared towards multiplayer experience, with built-in voice chat, plot claims, easy trading and much more!
body:
## PushkMC - Adventure-Tech Pack
Presented combination of mods provide user with enhanced vanilla experience, best played with group of friends.

### What it is
It's an enhanced version of vanilla Minecraft with couple of QoL enhancements as well as more structures to explore, villagers to interact with and since most likely you're playing it with your friends, also interacting with other players.

### What it is not
I would would be strongly against playing this modpack in singleplayer, as not only It's world generation can be demanding, especially for lower end computers, thus resulting in stuttering and bad experience. I would also not recommend playing it with more than 20-40 people not only because of performance concerns but also sheer amount of chaos.

### Technical
First of all, assign at least 2GB of RAM to the client instance to reduce GC runtime.
The same pack can be used on both client and server side without any issues.
